case_title: FENG, WEI XIONG et al VS HARRIS, SANDY SOAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, SANDY SOAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FENG, WEI XIONG HE, QUN YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, SANDY SOAN MICHEL, BRET $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $142.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,142.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $1000 AWARDED TO EACH DEFENDANT. THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IN THIS JUDGMENT TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM "LARRIS" TO HARRIS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MICHEL, BRET
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, SANDY SOAN MICHEL, BRET
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FENG, WEI XIONG HE, QUN YING AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, SANDY SOAN MICHEL, BRET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
